recommendations.title: The Furies
recommendations.overview: A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game — a game that can only have one winner.

recommendations.title: Ouija
recommendations.overview: A group of friends must confront their most terrifying fears when they awaken the dark powers of an ancient spirit board.

recommendations.title: Beloved
